{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Crimson Sun Rises
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Crimson Sun Rises]] is a technique that condenses fire aura and [[madra]] into a red ball.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara completed her [[Crimson Sun Rises]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
